use_cases: Interactive full-viewport backgrounds for hero sections on landing pages
Visual effect overlays for gaming or creative tool interfaces
Animated backgrounds for portfolio or creative agency websites
Ambient visual effects for video streaming or media platforms
Dynamic hero backgrounds for SaaS product marketing pages
ai_summary: A WebGL-powered interactive shader component that renders animated Voronoi crystal patterns. The shader responds to mouse movement, creating a fluid, organic visual effect with glass-like qualities. Configurable via props for cell density, animation speed, warp factor, and mouse influence. Designed as a full-viewport background or hero section effect with crisp rendering across device pixel ratios.
